# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a formal research paper with a concrete benchmark and reported evaluation results.

## Why

The excerpt presents SWE-bench as a benchmark paper built from 2,294 real GitHub issue-resolution tasks, describes benchmark construction, and reports measured model performance including explicit solve rates such as Claude 2 resolving 1.96% of issues. That is clear empirical substance and institute-worthy admission material.

## Limits

# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a formal research paper with a concrete benchmark and reported evaluation results.

## Why

The excerpt presents SWE-bench as a benchmark paper built from 2,294 real GitHub issue-resolution tasks, describes benchmark construction, and reports measured model performance including explicit solve rates such as Claude 2 resolving 1.96% of issues. That is clear empirical substance and institute-worthy admission material.

## Limits
